# Test Paper: A Study in Unit Testing

## One-line Summary

A comprehensive study on how to write effective unit tests for web dashboards.

## Key Contribution

Demonstrates that well-structured test suites catch bugs before they reach production.

## Methodology

- Evaluated multiple testing frameworks
- Compared unit, integration, and E2E test coverage
- Measured defect detection rate

## Results

- 95% defect detection with combined unit + integration tests
- E2E tests caught 3 critical UX bugs missed by unit tests
